image_prompt: A scientific illustration in the style of a Nature publication graphical abstract showing the outer membrane architecture of Gram-negative bacteria — split into two side-by-side labeled panels. LEFT PANEL (labeled 'Canonical Gram-negative OM'): a stylized cross-section of the outer membrane bilayer viewed from the side. The outer leaflet is decorated with LPS molecules — each showing a lipid A anchor with two branching fatty-acid chains embedded in the outer leaflet (shown in #F78E1E orange), connected to a short polysaccharide chain extending outward into the extracellular space. The inner leaflet shows rounded phospholipid headgroups. A thin undulating peptidoglycan mesh layer is visible just inside the inner membrane. The bilayer leaflets and membrane core are colored #007DC3 blue. The panel has a neutral border indicating a normal, intact cell. RIGHT PANEL (labeled 'Caulobacter crescentus ΔlpxC — viable'): the identical outer membrane cross-section view, but the outer leaflet is completely free of lipid A anchors and LPS chains — the outer leaflet is maintained by smaller, simpler anionic lipid headgroups without the characteristic branched lipid A tail. The outer membrane and cell are intact and structurally complete, with a subtle #5E9732 green border or small checkmark badge indicating viability. Between the two panels, a clean vertical dashed divider line with a scissors icon and struck-through gene label 'lpxC' to indicate the genetic deletion event. A small tag below the right panel carries the text label '1 of 4 Gram-negatives to survive'. Style: clean scientific illustration, flat colors, thin black outlines, white background, professional academic aesthetic. Color palette: #007DC3 blue for membrane bilayer, #5E9732 green for viable Caulobacter state marker, #F78E1E orange for LPS lipid A anchor chains. Aspect ratio 16:9. Text labels 'Canonical Gram-negative OM', 'Caulobacter crescentus ΔlpxC — viable', '1 of 4 Gram-negatives to survive', 'lpxC' (strikethrough) in clean sans-serif, placed as described. Do not include any other text, captions, titles, or annotations beyond the named labels.
negative_prompt: no quantitative content, no axes, no data points, no specific percentages or statistics, no p-values, no effect sizes, no human figures, no logos, no copyrighted imagery, no text in non-Latin scripts, no photorealistic rendering, no microscopy imagery, no other text or annotations beyond the named labels
